mapper.select: SELECT ea.apply_type AS subjectCode, CASE ea.apply_type WHEN 'TRAVEL' THEN '差旅费' WHEN 'OFFICE' THEN '办公费' WHEN 'ENTERTAIN' THEN '招待费' WHEN 'TRANSPORT' THEN '交通费' WHEN 'OTHER' THEN '其他费用' ELSE ea.apply_type END AS subjectName, COALESCE(SUM(ea.total_amount), 0) AS totalAmount, COUNT(ea.id) AS applyCount FROM exp_application ea WHERE ea.deleted = 0 AND YEAR(ea.apply_date) = #{year} AND MONTH(ea.apply_date) = #{period} GROUP BY ea.apply_type ORDER BY totalAmount DESC
